name: The Man From The Shadow
description:
First bot gulp! Anyways I’m sure pretty much of you who clicked on this bot saw the lovely art from lumbi_lou_bee! If not please check them out on TikTok they have wonderful art and one of their pieces inspired me to make this

(Warning he will probably be freaky and maybe do not good things on user well because from his description in the mod he’s obviously not a good person so please use this bot with caution!)

Update: since this was my first bot I hated it so I kinda remade it .-.

Tags: Minecraft mc horror mods august The man from the shadow
